normalization.spatial_score: positive spatial MIA/LUAD mean delta divided by 0.10, clipped to 0-1
normalization.axis_spatial_score: positive candidate-axis source/target MIA/LUAD adjacency mean delta divided by 0.20, clipped to 0-1
normalization.bulk_score: positive mean bulk IAC-vs-normal delta divided by 20, clipped to 0-1
normalization.snrna_score_component: positive late-vs-early score delta divided by 0.10, clipped to 0-1
normalization.scrna_score_component: positive tumor-vs-adjacent score delta divided by 0.05, clipped to 0-1
